top_papers.title: LiFT: Learning to Fine-Tune via Bayesian Parameter Efficient Meta Fine-Tuning
top_papers.why_it_matters: LiFT: Learning to Fine-Tune via Bayesian Parameter Efficient Meta Fine-Tuning represents a meaningful contribution to its field and opens new research directions.
top_papers.one_line_takeaway: That is, we propose a method for {\em learning-to-fine-tune} (LiFT).
top_papers.content_hook: A new paper that could change how we think about Bayesian methods.

top_papers.content_hook: AI that takes action, not just text — a new step forward.

top_papers.content_hook: Making AI systems safer is one of the most important problems in tech right now.

top_papers.title: GTR: Improving Large 3D Reconstruction Models through Geometry and Texture Refinement
top_papers.why_it_matters: GTR: Improving Large 3D Reconstruction Models through Geometry and Texture Refinement extends Transformer capabilities — the architecture underpinning virtually every modern NLP and vision model.
top_papers.one_line_takeaway: We propose a novel approach for 3D mesh reconstruction from multi-view images.
top_papers.content_hook: A new paper that could change how we think about 3D Reconstruction.
